api_key.description: Luma API key, sent as the x-luma-api-key header. Never logged.

base_url.description: Luma API base URL override for tests or proxies.

event_api_id.description: Legacy-compatible Luma event ID used by event_guests and event_hosts streams.

event_id.description: Luma event ID used by event detail, guest, coupon, ticket type, and lookup streams.

guest_id.description: Luma guest ID or accepted guest identifier for the guest detail stream.

event_ticket_type_id.description: Luma ticket type ID for the ticket type detail stream.

webhook_id.description: Luma webhook ID for the webhook detail stream.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for legacy credential-free tests.
